name: subagent contract validator rejects an agent missing the required prompt_id field
command:
printf -- '---
name: x
model: sonnet
---
' > agent.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/validate-contract.sh" --agent agent.md 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*prompt_id' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
